title: Smells Like Teen Spirit
description: A raw, explosive anthem that became the voice of a generation and defined the grunge movement.

title: Wonderwall
description: A timeless Britpop ballad that became one of the most beloved acoustic songs of all time.

title: Creep
description: A raw confession of self-loathing and alienation that became an unlikely anthem for outsiders.

title: Zombie
description: A powerful protest song about The Troubles in Northern Ireland with unforgettable vocals.

title: Mr. Brightside
description: An energetic rock anthem about jealousy and suspicion that became a decade-defining song.

title: Seven Nation Army
description: A minimalist rock masterpiece with a bass riff played on guitar that became a global sports chant.

title: In the End
description: A genre-blending anthem combining rap and rock about futility and frustration.

title: Come As You Are
description: A moody, introspective grunge track with one of rock's most recognizable bass riffs.

title: Under the Bridge
description: A melancholic introspective ballad about loneliness and redemption in Los Angeles.

title: Under the Bridge

title: Song 2
description: A short, explosive rock song known for its 'WOO-HOO!' chorus that became a stadium staple.

title: Last Resort
description: A raw nu metal anthem about suicide and desperation that became a massive early 2000s hit.

title: Chop Suey!
description: A genre-defying metal masterpiece with unpredictable shifts and profound lyrics about death.

title: Californication
description: A melodic rock anthem critiquing Hollywood culture and the entertainment industry.

title: Kryptonite
description: A post-grunge hit about unconditional love using Superman as a metaphor.

title: Yellow
description: A beautiful, soaring rock ballad that launched Coldplay to international stardom.

title: The Middle
description: An uplifting, energetic rock anthem about self-acceptance and not giving up.

title: Iris
description: A heartfelt acoustic rock ballad that became one of the most played songs of the 90s.

title: Otherside
description: A melodic rock track about addiction, loss, and the struggle for redemption.

title: You're Not Here
description: A haunting rock track that blends melancholy lyrics with grungy guitar riffs from the Silent Hill 3 soundtrack.

title: Null Moon
description: An atmospheric, melancholic instrumental piece that captures the eerie loneliness of Silent Hill 2.
